positive: Stylized vintage botanical illustration, showcasing lush jungle foliage surrounding a central, minimalist geometric gold compass. The plants include vibrant monstera leaves, delicate fern fronds, and exotic tropical flowers, drawn with strong black linework and negative space. The gold compass should be depicted with clean, sharp lines, contrasting against the organic growth. Flat composition, high contrast black ink on off-white parchment paper background. Graphic novel aesthetic mixed with Art Nouveau style. Clean silhouettes, highly detailed engraving style, perfect for apparel print.
